payload.planText: Gallery in-section navigation plan. Section 4 tasks: (1) Create shared app/components/GalleryGrid.tsx with prev/next arrows (desktop, minimal chevrons), keyboard ArrowLeft/Right/Escape, mobile swipe left/right, curated-order index, stop-at-ends. (2) Wire foodphotography page. (3) Wire propertyphotography page. (4) Delete obsolete per-page GalleryGrid.tsx and verify mobile swipe. No [DOCS:*] or [ADR:*] tags are used in this plan; no engineering-docs scaffold exists in the repo and the change is a minor component consolidation.
